---
title: "Yusuf Kurnia Romadhon"
---

## Business Intelligence & Analytics Portfolio

I am a data analytics professional with over 6 years of experience delivering enterprise reporting, data integration, and analytics solutions across multiple industries. I am currently undertaking a **Master of Business Analytics at Monash University** as an **Australia Awards Scholar**.

My work focuses on transforming fragmented data and manual reporting into reliable, scalable analytics systems that support operational and strategic decision making. I have experience building analytics products, improving data governance, and delivering insights that create measurable business impact.

**Focus Areas:**\
Data Analytics • Data Science • Decision Intelligence • Data Systems & Governance

**Preferred locations:**\
Current availability: Melbourne, Australia   
Open to international opportunities post-graduation

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**6+ years experience** • **Business Intelligence & Analytics** • **Australia Awards Scholar**

## What I do

I help organisations transform fragmented data and manual reporting into reliable analytics systems that support operational and strategic decision making.

My work typically involves:

-   Leading the definition of business questions and KPIs with stakeholders.
-   Designing and delivering reporting and analytics solutions aligned to business priorities.
-   Improving data quality, governance, and documentation to support consistent decision-making.
-   Presenting insights and recommendations to non-technical and executive audiences.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## How I think about analytics

I believe good analytics is not about tools alone. It is about:

-   Clear problem definition before analysis.
-   Responsible and ethical use of data.
-   Reproducibility and documentation.
-   Insights that lead to action, not just dashboards.
-   Strong alignment between analytics, business context, and stakeholder needs.

This mindset guides how I design analytics solutions in both professional and applied academic settings.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Selected work

This portfolio highlights a selection of analytics projects, including interactive dashboards, data engineering workflows, ethical data documentation, and applied analytics case studies.

Each project summary focuses on:

-   The business problem
-   My role and approach
-   The practical outcome

Detailed project summaries and links to technical repositories are available on the Projects page.
